FlowDefinition.description: When the LOI Date gets populated, the Asset In Deal searched for an open Asset Target Audit record. If a record is found, the Asset Target Audit is related to it, thereby closing it off with the Target Reached set by the LOI Date. If no open record is found, a new Asset Target Audit is created and then associated with the Asset In Deal, thereby, immediately closing it off.
FlowDefinition.masterLabel: Prodigy - Autolaunched - Asset In Deal Relate To Asset Target Audit
